message: Autoresearch goal created: Figure out if using OpenAI SDK/API with local OAuth Bearer Token would be possible and have possibly better results than existing codex exec based subprocesses, especially for integration with Reverso's Anthropic API surface

evidence: Research passed rubric: verified Reverso source is codex exec subprocess backed, no OpenAI SDK imports/dependency; checked official Codex auth docs, OpenAI Python README, and OpenAPI spec for Responses/API-key bearer auth; ran redacted live probes showing local Codex ChatGPT OAuth bearer has api.openai.com audience but only connector scopes, with /v1/models missing api.model.read and /v1/responses missing api.responses.write; recommendation is split codex-cli agent mode from OpenAI direct Responses adapter gated by Platform API key.

User decision recorded: keep current Reverso Codex architecture. Continue using codex exec subprocess backend with validate-only ~/.codex/auth.json OAuth gate; do not add direct OpenAI SDK/API adapter or use local Codex OAuth bearer for Platform API calls now.
